---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the Kurigram Nursery Registry
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
For example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]" -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
For UI features, describe the user flow and expected behavior. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Mockup / Sketch (optional)

<!-- If this is a UI change, attach a sketch, screenshot, or describe the layout in words. -->

## Scope

- **Affected area:** [ ] Frontend (UI/UX)  [ ] API  [ ] Data pipeline  [ ] Documentation  [ ] CI/CD  [ ] Other
- **Estimated complexity:** [ ] Small (1 PR)  [ ] Medium (2–3 PRs)  [ ] Large (multi-PR effort)
- **Would you like to implement this yourself?** [ ] Yes  [ ] No  [ ] Maybe — needs discussion

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
For example:
- Related issues (e.g., "Closes #123")
- References to similar features in other registry apps
- Domain context (e.g., how DAE field officers would use this) -->

## Alignment with Project Goals

<!-- Briefly explain how this feature aligns with the project's purpose:
cataloguing 137 plant nurseries across 9 upazilas of Kurigram District. -->

---

### Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the [existing issues](https://github.com/moniruzjaman/kurigram_nursery_registry/issues) to avoid duplicates.
- [ ] I have read the [README](https://github.com/moniruzjaman/kurigram_nursery_registry/blob/main/README.md) and [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/moniruzjaman/kurigram_nursery_registry/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] This feature does not introduce paid third-party dependencies (the project is intentionally zero-cost).
